notes_canvas_language_check.name: notes_canvas_language_check
notes_canvas_language_check.value:
("notes"."source_type"::text = 'canvas' AND "notes"."canvas_language" IS NOT NULL)
          OR (("notes"."source_type" IS NULL OR "notes"."source_type"::text <> 'canvas') AND "notes"."canvas_language" IS NULL)
